input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8742 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The existing tests reference org.apache.pekko.actor.TypedActor and TypedProps, which are not present in the 2.0.0-M1 actor artifact; those tests should be replaced with supported classic actor APIs rather than solved by setup.

Modern Pekko Typed APIs live in the separate org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor-typed_2.13 artifact; do not add that dependency unless intentionally testing that separate module instead of pekko-actor_2.13.

Pekko documentation recommends pekko-testkit for conventional actor unit testing, but meaningful reachability coverage can still be written against the target actor artifact directly, so it is not required deterministic setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1 has only scala-library and com.typesafe:config runtime dependencies, and core classic actor coverage is reachable without external services, Docker, environment variables, or additional Maven dependencies.
